titles.text: サバイバルキッズ 孤島の冒険者

descriptions.text:
Survival Kids, known as Stranded Kids in Europe, is a 1999 survival video game developed and published by Konami for the Game Boy Color. The gameplay revolves around surviving on a deserted island, and features an open-ended structure that presents the player with multiple ways to progress. It is the first in the Survival Kids series in Japan, which goes under the name Lost in Blue in North America and Europe. 
Survival Kids received its first official re-release on the Nintendo Classics service on May 23, 2025.
Stranded Kids, anche noto come Survival Kids, è un videogioco di ruolo sviluppato e pubblicato da Konami nel 1999 per Game Boy Color.

Survival Kids é um jogo de Game Boy Color desenvolvido pela Konami e lançado em 1999. O enredo do jogo envolve sobreviventes perdidos em uma ilha. O jogo possui uma estrutura na qual o jogador tem várias opções de progredir durante o jogo.

『サバイバルキッズ』は、ヨーロッパでは『Stranded Kids』として知られる、コナミがゲームボーイカラー向けに開発・発売した1999年のサバイバルビデオゲームです。ゲームプレイは無人島でのサバイバルをテーマとしており、プレイヤーに複数の進行方法を提供するオープンエンドな構造が特徴です。本作は、北米およびヨーロッパでは『Lost in Blue』という名称で知られる『サバイバルキッズ』シリーズの日本における最初の一作となります。
『サバイバルキッズ』は、2025年5月23日に任天堂クラシックサービスで初めて公式にリリースタイムを迎えました。
